app.name: DomestIQ
search.title: Thola Abasebenzi
consent.title: Imvume Yobumfihlo
consent.message: Siqoqa futhi sicubungula imininingwane yakho silandela umthetho we-POPI Act. Ngokuqhubeka, uvuma izindlela zethu zokusebenzisa idatha yakho.
landing.hero.subtext: Abantu abagcina amakhaya eNingizimu Afrika esebenza bafanele okungaphezu kokuthembela emavini omlomo. DomestIQ ixhumanisa abasebenzi namakhaya ngqo — ngamaphrofayela aqinisekisiwe, izibuyekezo zeqiniso, futhi abasebenzi bagcina yonke imali abayenzayo.
landing.problem.waiting_desc: Abasebenzi abanamakhono bahlala ngaphandle kwamasango ama-estate amahora, benethemba lokuthi kukhona ozobadinga namuhla.
landing.problem.door_desc: Akukho i-ID, akukho izibuyekezo, akukho izincomelo. Kumele unethembe nje ukuthi umuntu ungulowo athi uyena.
landing.problem.cash_desc: Akukho ubufakazi obubhaliwe. Akukho uqinisekiso lomsebenzi owenziwe. Uma imali ingapheleli, kuphelile nje.
landing.worker.body: Akusekho ukuhlala ulinde. Akusekho ukuqala phansi njalo uma ulahlekelwa yikhasimende. Yakha iphrofayela yakho kanye — izibuyekezo zakho, izincomelo, nedumela lakho kukulandela noma ukuphi.
landing.worker.b1_desc: Imisebenzi iza ocingweni lwakho. Akusekho ukulinda emasangweni nokubuza.
landing.worker.b2_desc: Wonke umsebenzi omuhle uthola isibuyekezo. Sonke isibuyekezo siletha umsebenzi olandelayo. Awuphindi uqale phansi.
landing.worker.b3_desc: Amakhasimende nawo aqinisekisiwe. Bona ukuthi uya kuphi ungakafiki.
landing.worker.b4_desc: Bhalisa ngocingo lwakho nje. Cindezela izithombe ukhethe amakhono akho — akukho ukuthayipha, akukho amafomu.
landing.worker.b5_desc: Sebenzisa DomestIQ ngesiZulu, isiXhosa, Sesotho, Afrikaans — zonke izilimi ze-SA eziyi-11.
landing.worker.b6_desc: Asithathi lutho emholweni wakho. Hhayi manje, hhayi nini.
landing.worker.b7_desc: Uyazi umuntu okahle? Yabelana ngekhodi yakho. Uma bejoyina, nobabili niyathola.
landing.worker.b8_desc: Yakha i-CV yobuchwepheshe usuka kuphrofayela yakho. Layisha i-PDF uyisebenzise noma kuphi — ngeyakho.
landing.cv.body: Amakhono akho, umlando womsebenzi, nezibuyekezo zakho — kuphendulwa kube yidokhumenti efanelekile ongayinika noma ubani. Hhayi ye-DomestIQ kuphela. Ngeyakho.
landing.cv.portable: I-CV yakho isebenza noma kuphi. Iyiphrinte. Iyithumele nge-imeyili. Iyinikeze esangweni.
landing.client.body: Ama-ID aqinisekisiwe. Ukuhlolwa kwemvelaphi. Izibuyekezo zeqiniso ezivela emakhaya afana nelakho. Yeka ukuthembela kumngane womngane uqale uqashe ngolwazi lweqiniso.
landing.client.b1_desc: Wonke umsebenzi angaqinisekisa i-ID yakhe yase-SA nokukhululeka kobugebengu. Ubona ibheji ungakabhuki.
landing.client.b2_desc: Izilinganiso ezivela emakhaya angempela. Izincomelo ezibhaliwe ongazifunda ungakathathi isinqumo.
landing.client.b3_desc: Bona abasebenzi bendawo yakho, bahlelwe ngebanga. Thola umuntu osegumbini elilandelayo.
landing.client.b4_desc: Kanye noma njalo. Khetha usuku, khetha isikhathi, thumela isicelo. Kuphelile.
landing.how.ws1_desc: Cindezela izithombe ukukhetha amakhono akho. Akudingeki ukuthayipha, akudingeki amafomu, akudingeki i-imeyili.
landing.how.ws2_desc: Iphrofayela yakho, isilinganiso, nokutholakala kwakho kubonakala uma abantu besesha endaweni yakho.
landing.how.ws3_desc: Yamukela noma wenqabe. Beka amanani akho nesheduli yakho. Yilawula wena.
landing.how.ws4_desc: Umsebenzi omuhle uthola izibuyekezo. Izibuyekezo ziletha izibhukingo eziningi. Kuyanda.
landing.how.cs2_desc: Funda izibuyekezo, bona amabheji okuqinisekisa, buka umlando wabo womsebenzi.
landing.how.cs3_desc: Thumela isicelo noma uxoxe kuqala. Hlelani imininingwane phakathi kwenu.
landing.how.cs4_desc: Isilinganiso sakho sisize abasebenzi abahle babonakale. Kugcina umphakathi eqinisweni.
landing.services.subtext: Kusukela osizweni lwansuku zonke kuye kubuchwepheshe obukhulu. Abasebenzi babhalisa abakwenzayo. Wena uthola kanye lowo omfunayo.
landing.stories.s1_quote: Bengijwayele ukulinda amasonto phakathi kwemisebenzi. Manje ngithola izibhukingo njalo masonto. Izingane zami sezikwazi ukudla kahle.
landing.stories.s2_quote: Angikwazi ukufunda kahle kodwa izithombe zenza kube lula. Ngizibhalisile ngokwami. Ngingasizwanga muntu.
landing.stories.s3_quote: Ngaphambilini, bengingenawo ubufakazi bokuthi ngikwazi umsebenzi wami. Manje izibuyekezo zami zikhuluma ngami. Amakhasimende angethemba ngingakafiki.
landing.stories.s4_quote: Ukuthola umsizi othembekile bekusho ukubuza abangani bese unethemba lokuhle. Akusenjalo.
landing.stories.s5_quote: Ngiyazi ukuthi ngubani oza emzini wami. Uma unezingane, lokho kubaluleke ngaphezu kwakho konke.
landing.stories.s6_quote: Ngibeka amanani ami. Akekho othatha ingxenye. Ngenze R8,000 ngenyanga edlule nge-DomestIQ kuphela.
landing.cta.body: Wonke umsebenzi owakha iphrofayela udala ubufakazi bamakhono akhe. Wonke umuzi obhuka nge-DomestIQ wakha ukwethemba ohlelweni. Siyilungisa kanje — ukuxhumana okuqinisekisiwe okunye ngesikhathi.
landing.footer.disclaimer: DomestIQ iyipulatifomu yokuxhumanisa. Ayikho ubudlelwano bokuqashwa obudalwayo phakathi kwabasebenzisi.
landing.trust.t1_desc: Idatha yakho ivikelwe ngaphansi komthetho wase-SA
landing.trust.t3_desc: Xoxa ngepulatifomu — akukho izinombolo zomuntu ezivelayo
landing.faq.a1: Yebo. Abasebenzi bagcina wonke uRandi abawenzayo — asithathi ikhomishini. Ipulatifomu ixhaswe yimali encane yesevisi ekhokhwa amakhaya uma ebhuka.
landing.faq.a2: Noma yiluphi ucingo olunenthanethi luyasebenza. DomestIQ isebenza ebhrawuzeni — Android noma iPhone. Akudingeki ukulanda. Ungaze uyifake naseskrini sasekhaya njengeapp.
landing.faq.a3: Abasebenzi balayisha i-ID yase-SA nesitifiketi sokukhululwa kobugebengu. Ithimba lethu lihlola amadokhumenti linikeze ibheji yegolide. Abasebenzi abaqinisekisiwe bathola izibhukingo eziningi.
landing.faq.a4: Ngokuphelele. Ihambisana ne-POPIA. Idatha yakho iyinkripthiwe, ayithengiswa, futhi yabelwana ngayo ngemvume yakho kuphela.
landing.faq.a5: Joburg, Cape Town, Durban, Pretoria, PE, namadolobha amaningi njalo enyangeni. Bhalisa manje noma indawo yakho ingakabalwa — siyandlala ngokushesha.
landing.faq.a6: Sesha umsebenzi, hlola iphrofayela yakhe nezibuyekezo, bese ucela usuku nesikhathi. Umsebenzi uyamukela noma enqaba. Ungaze uxhumane naye kuqala nihlelane imininingwane.
landing.faq.a7: Yebo — wekanye noma njalo, kokubili kuyasebenza. Udinga ukuhlanza okujulile ngoMgqibelo noma umakhi wengadi wamaviki onke? Kunoma ikuphi.
landing.faq.a8: Zonke izilimi ze-SA ezisemthethweni eziyi-11 — isiNgisi, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Afrikaans, Sesotho, nokunye. Abasebenzi bangabhalisa baxoxe ngolimi abaluthandayo.
landing.cities.subtext: Abasebenzi namakhaya baxhuma emadolobheni amakhulu. Amadolobha amaningi njalo nyanga.
landing.cities.not_listed: Awuliboni idolobha lakho? Bhalisa noma kunjalo — siyandlala ngokushesha.
landing.pwa.title: Faka DomestIQ Eskrini Sasekhaya
landing.pwa.desc: Thola ukufinyelela okusheshayo ezibhukingweni, emilayezweni, nokunye.
